name: Stock Yards Bancorp, Inc.
summary: PART I . Stock Yards Bancorp, Inc. (Bancorp or the Company), is a FHC headquartered in Louisville, Kentucky and is engaged in the business of banking through its wholly owned subsidiary, Stock Yards Bank & Trust Company (SYB or the Bank). Bancorp, which was incorporated in 1988 in Kentucky, is registered with, and subject to supervision, regulation and examination by, the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System.
